(In reply to sasamotikomi from comment #8)
Also some issue:
Any flash object( youtube etc.) 
press right mouse button -> setting ( isn't possible to change any setting)

(Firefox private window) Wineserver (and slave process) isn't shutdown when all tab with plugin closed (plugin-container shutdown)or Firefox closed(just setting?) repeatable if only private window is open.
